headline: BNP Paribas Initiates Coverage On Carrier Global with Neutral Rating, Announces Price Target of $62
summary: BNP Paribas  analyst Andrew Buscaglia   initiates coverage on Carrier Global (NYSE:CARR) with a Neutral rating and announces Price Target of $62.
